TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Sen-ti-ya-ke, title = Sen-ti-ya-ke, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sen-ti-ya-ke} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Sen-ti-ya-ke, Sen-ti-ya-ke, anucaay Sen-tye-ke, nu Si-pang-ya a kamu anucaay Pu-taw-ya a kamu sakay Sen-ya-ke "Santiago", Si-pang-ya pangiha(san'tja…£o)" a pangangan. zuma 15 se-ci Si-pang-ya bang-ci-huy nu bukesi "San Diego" a pangangan, nipabelin tuni a ngangan, anucaay u Sen-tye-ke, Sen-ti-ye-ke. Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la "Si-pang-ya a ngangan Santiago de Compostela, imi u "mazeketay a bunac ulaulanganay a Sen-ti-ye-ke" nu Si-pang-ya Ka-li-si-ya sakakuay a kitizaan a cen-bu, tademaw caay ka katukuh tu 10 a emang. (Santiago,Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(san'tja…£o))ÁöĄÁ®ĪŚĎľ.ŚŹ¶Ś§Ė,šĽ•15 :Santiago de CompostelaÔľõśĄŹÁāļ" . nilaculan sikamu Ye-su 12 ku mikilulay cinizaan ci Ta-ya-ke itini mitadem, u tinsikiw kakatayzaan mibaung. makay se-ci hawsa, tulin sa ku tayniay mibaungan, katukuh i Ba-kow kasa kitizaanmakayni pasayza i Si-pang-ya saamisan masa caca singanganay a zazan nu mibaungay, Sen-ya-ke a zazan. Sen-ti-ya-ke -Te-kung-pow-s-tla sumamaday a tukuay I 1985 a mihcaan mapasisil u kitakitay lalangawan nu nisubelidan a zaysang. Si-pang-ya a labu atu Ba-kow a labuay " Sen-ya-ke a zazan" pasasumaen i 1993 a mihcaan atu 1998 a hihcaan mapasisil tusa a siyang cacayay a kitakit a lalangawan nu nisubelidan a zaysang. Sen-ti-yake-Te-kong-pow-ste-la cacay u mataliyukay nu buyu' ibatada nu adidi'ay a niyazu', Si-pang-ya a kmu kasikazan a ngangan u Sen-ti-yw-ke "Sen-ya-ke nu Si-pang-ya a kamu a ngangan", uyni a kitizaan i kung-yen 4 se-ci ayaw nanu Low-mw a tadem, 5 se-ci tu saayaway a mihca macalap nu Su-wi-bey a tademaw, 585 a nihcaan atu Su-wi-bey hunngti a kanatal u liwanzuma mapulung maenuc nu Li-aw-wi-ci-al-te "Liuvigild", mala nu Si-ke-te-hungti a kanatal nu sakaenem a sakuwan. kung-yen 711 a mihcaan, makayzaay saamis nu Bey tu cacayay nu Mu-s-lin a hitay itiza tu i Pu-low-tu capi nu Si-pang-ya tukus nu bayu tahkal. Si-ya-ke a Si-pang-ya hungti a kanatal malingatu tu cayay tu ku icelang, 7 a mihcaan hamin mataliyukay nu bayu a subal makayni piecaw, matalud matinenng mingayaw midebung mikuwan, nakamuan Sen-ya-ke natayza i Si-panga-ya musakamu tu nu kiwkay 7 a mihcaan, mapatay zikuz ya ukak tademen i Si-pang-ya. malakui' tu ku pinay a mihcaanz ikuz, u tadem niza nayay tu ku matinengay nu tademaw. katukuh 813 a mihcaan maazih tu nu malukay ku tadem zikuz, patizeng hantu nu tademaw tu cacay adidi'ay a kiwkay, pangangan hantu ku itiniay tu "Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la", zumaTe-kung-pow-s-te-la nu La-tin a kamu "Campus Stellae" "bunac a ulaulangan" anucaay "Compositum" "tadem" a nisasuma. "Campus Stellae" śąĖŤÄÖ"Compositum" śľĒŚĆĖšĺÜÁöĄ. nikuz, Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la mala nu Si-pan-ya mahiza u ciwlu, si-yen 10 se-citu sazikuzay a mihcaan, uyni a niyazu' namapeleng nu A-al-man mikeliday tu Mu-s-lin a hitay, nika kilul i 11 se-ci mahamin tu muliyaw mapatizeng, 12 se-ci tu sang-pan-ye, u balucu' patabaki tu icelang nu Ka-s-ti-li-ya hungti a kanatal atu Low-ma cyaw-tin a malecad ku balucu'. malingatu palahad tu pibaungan itini micunus tu sakay Si-pan g-ya tu kalilid nu kiwkay, sangaleb tulin tayni itini ku mibaungay, mahiza masa cacay u singanganay nu mibaungay a zazan nu Sen-ya-ke a zazan, a mililid ku Sen-ya-ke, Si-pang-ya i cung-se-ci a kitakitan u saicelangay, muliyaw malahad ku kesey, kahak atu nalimaan cacanan nu hekalay. nuayawan, labu nu tukay masinga' tu kunu makay cang-se-ci amalepun tu masanha' ku nipatizeng. . imahini, Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la a tinsikiw nu tukay a singanganay a panutekan, Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la a talakaway a cacudadan patizen g i 16 se-ci, saayaway angangan pasubana' tu sesiw, imahini 4 a emang ku mkicudaday pulung nu talakaway a cacudadan. 2013 a mihcaan 7 a bulad, tiniay nasikawaw pihacengay ku silamalay a satebuc. Ś¶āšĽä, . malalitin tui hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == s…ôn-ti-ja-k…ô, s…ôn-ti-ja-k…ô, anu ¶aaj s…ôn-tj…ô-k…ô, nu si-paŇč-ja a kamu anu ¶aaj pu-taw-ja a kamu sakaj s…ôn-ja-k…ô "santiago", si-paŇč-ja paŇčińßa(san Ē~ °tja*o)" a paŇčaŇčan. zuma ** s…ô- ¶i si-paŇč-ja baŇč- ¶i-ńßuj nu buk…ôsi "san di…ôgo" a paŇčaŇčan, nipab…ôr~…ĺin tuni a ŇčaŇčan, anu ¶aaj u s…ôn-tj…ô-k…ô, s…ôn-ti-j…ô-k…ô. s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa "si-paŇč-ja a ŇčaŇčan santiago d…ô ¶ompost…ôr~…ĺa, imi u "maz…ôk…ôtaj a buna ¶ ur~…ĺaur~…ĺaŇčanaj a s…ôn-ti-j…ô-k…ô" nu si-paŇč-ja ka-r~…ĺi-si-ja sakakuaj a kitizaan a ¶…ôn-bu, tad…ômaw ¶aaj ka katukuńß tu ** a …ômaŇč. (santiago,******:(san Ē~ °tja*o))***.**,*** :santiago d…ô ¶ompost…ôr~…ĺa***" . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan sikamu j…ô-su ** ku mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj ¶inizaan ¶i ta-ja-k…ô itini mitad…ôm, u tinsikiw kakatajzaan mibauŇč. makaj s…ô- ¶i ńßawsa, tur~…ĺin sa ku tajniaj mibauŇčan, katukuńß i ba-kow kasa kitizaanmakajni pasajza i si-paŇč-ja saamisan masa ¶a ¶a siŇčaŇčanaj a zazan nu mibauŇčaj, s…ôn-ja-k…ô a zazan. s…ôn-ti-ja-k…ô -t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-tr~…ĺa sumamadaj a tukuaj i **** a mińß ¶aan mapasisir~…ĺ u kitakitaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč. si-paŇč-ja a r~…ĺabu atu ba-kow a r~…ĺabuaj " s…ôn-ja-k…ô a zazan" pasasuma…ôn i **** a mińß ¶aan atu **** a ńßińß ¶aan mapasisir~…ĺ tusa a sijaŇč ¶a ¶ajaj a kitakit a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč. s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-koŇč-pow-st…ô-r~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj u matar~…ĺijukaj nu buju Ē~ ° ibatada nu adidi Ē~ °aj a nijazu Ē~ °, si-paŇč-ja a kmu kasikazan a ŇčaŇčan u s…ôn-ti-jw-k…ô "s…ôn-ja-k…ô nu si-paŇč-ja a kamu a ŇčaŇčan", ujni a kitizaan i kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i ajaw nanu r~…ĺow-mw a tad…ôm, * s…ô- ¶i tu saajawaj a mińß ¶a ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu su-wi-b…ô a tad…ômaw, *** a nińß ¶aan atu su-wi-b…ô ńßunŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ u r~…ĺiwanzuma mapur~…ĺuŇč ma…ônu ¶ nu r~…ĺi-aw-wi- ¶i-ar~…ĺ-t…ô "r~…ĺiu*igir~…ĺd", mar~…ĺa nu si-k…ô-t…ô-ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ nu saka…ôn…ôm a sakuwan. kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan, makajzaaj saamis nu b…ô tu ¶a ¶ajaj nu mu-s-r~…ĺin a ńßitaj itiza tu i pu-r~…ĺow-tu ¶api nu si-paŇč-ja tukus nu baju tańßkar~…ĺ. si-ja-k…ô a si-paŇč-ja ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ¶ajaj tu ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, * a mińß ¶aan ńßamin matar~…ĺijukaj nu baju a subar~…ĺ makajni pi…ô ¶aw, matar~…ĺud matin…ônŇč miŇčajaw mid…ôbuŇč mikuwan, nakamuan s…ôn-ja-k…ô natajza i si-paŇča-ja musakamu tu nu kiwkaj * a mińß ¶aan, mapataj zikuz ja ukak tad…ôm…ôn i si-paŇč-ja. mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu ku pinaj a mińß ¶aanz ikuz, u tad…ôm niza najaj tu ku matin…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw. katukuńß *** a mińß ¶aan maazińß tu nu mar~…ĺukaj ku tad…ôm zikuz, patiz…ôŇč ńßantu nu tad…ômaw tu ¶a ¶aj adidi Ē~ °aj a kiwkaj, paŇčaŇčan ńßantu ku itiniaj tu "s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa", zumat…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa nu r~…ĺa-tin a kamu " ¶ampus st…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa…ô" "buna ¶ a ur~…ĺaur~…ĺaŇčan" anu ¶aaj " ¶ompositum" "tad…ôm" a nisasuma. " ¶ampus st…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa…ô" **" ¶ompositum" ****. nikuz, s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa mar~…ĺa nu si-pan-ja mańßiza u ¶iwr~…ĺu, si-j…ôn ** s…ô- ¶itu sazikuzaj a mińß ¶aan, ujni a nijazu Ē~ ° namap…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč nu a-ar~…ĺ-man mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu mu-s-r~…ĺin a ńßitaj, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ i ** s…ô- ¶i mańßamin tu mur~…ĺijaw mapatiz…ôŇč, ** s…ô- ¶i tu saŇč-pan-j…ô, u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° patabaki tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu ka-s-ti-r~…ĺi-ja ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ atu r~…ĺow-ma ¶jaw-tin a mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺańßad tu pibauŇčan itini mi ¶unus tu sakaj si-pan g-ja tu kar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu kiwkaj, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb tur~…ĺin tajni itini ku mibauŇčaj, mańßiza masa ¶a ¶aj u siŇčaŇčanaj nu mibauŇčaj a zazan nu s…ôn-ja-k…ô a zazan, a mir~…ĺir~…ĺid ku s…ôn-ja-k…ô, si-paŇč-ja i ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i a kitakitan u sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, mur~…ĺijaw mar~…ĺańßad ku k…ôs…ô, kańßak atu nar~…ĺimaan ¶a ¶anan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj. nuajawan, r~…ĺabu nu tukaj masiŇča Ē~ ° tu kunu makaj ¶aŇč-s…ô- ¶i amar~…ĺ…ôpun tu masanńßa Ē~ ° ku nipatiz…ôŇč. . imańßini, s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa a tinsikiw nu tukaj a siŇčaŇčanaj a panut…ôkan, s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa a tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan patiz…ôn g i ** s…ô- ¶i, saajawaj aŇčaŇčan pasubana Ē~ ° tu s…ôsiw, imańßini * a …ômaŇč ku mki ¶udadaj pur~…ĺuŇč nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad, tiniaj nasikawaw pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj ku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a sat…ôbu ¶. **, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tui ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Sen-ti-ya-ke, Sen-ti-ya-ke, anucaay Sen-tye-ke, nu Si-pang-ya a kamu anucaay Pu-taw-ya a kamu sakay Sen-ya-ke "Santiago", Si-pang-ya pangiha(san'tja…£o)" a pangangan. zuma 15 se-ci Si-pang-ya bang-ci-huy nu bukesi "San Diego" a pangangan, nipabelin tuni a ngangan, anucaay u Sen-tye-ke, Sen-ti-ye-ke. Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la "Si-pang-ya a ngangan Santiago de Compostela, imi u "mazeketay a bunac ulaulanganay a Sen-ti-ye-ke" nu Si-pang-ya Ka-li-si-ya sakakuay a kitizaan a cen-bu, tademaw caay ka katukuh tu 10 a emang. (Santiago,Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(san'tja…£o))ÁöĄÁ®ĪŚĎľ.ŚŹ¶Ś§Ė,šĽ•15 :Santiago de CompostelaÔľõśĄŹÁāļ" . nilaculan sikamu Ye-su 12 ku mikilulay cinizaan ci Ta-ya-ke itini mitadem, u tinsikiw kakatayzaan mibaung. makay se-ci hawsa, tulin sa ku tayniay mibaungan, katukuh i Ba-kow kasa kitizaanmakayni pasayza i Si-pang-ya saamisan masa caca singanganay a zazan nu mibaungay, Sen-ya-ke a zazan. Sen-ti-ya-ke -Te-kung-pow-s-tla sumamaday a tukuay I 1985 a mihcaan mapasisil u kitakitay lalangawan nu nisubelidan a zaysang. Si-pang-ya a labu atu Ba-kow a labuay " Sen-ya-ke a zazan" pasasumaen i 1993 a mihcaan atu 1998 a hihcaan mapasisil tusa a siyang cacayay a kitakit a lalangawan nu nisubelidan a zaysang. Sen-ti-yake-Te-kong-pow-ste-la cacay u mataliyukay nu buyu' ibatada nu adidi'ay a niyazu', Si-pang-ya a kmu kasikazan a ngangan u Sen-ti-yw-ke "Sen-ya-ke nu Si-pang-ya a kamu a ngangan", uyni a kitizaan i kung-yen 4 se-ci ayaw nanu Low-mw a tadem, 5 se-ci tu saayaway a mihca macalap nu Su-wi-bey a tademaw, 585 a nihcaan atu Su-wi-bey hunngti a kanatal u liwanzuma mapulung maenuc nu Li-aw-wi-ci-al-te "Liuvigild", mala nu Si-ke-te-hungti a kanatal nu sakaenem a sakuwan. kung-yen 711 a mihcaan, makayzaay saamis nu Bey tu cacayay nu Mu-s-lin a hitay itiza tu i Pu-low-tu capi nu Si-pang-ya tukus nu bayu tahkal. Si-ya-ke a Si-pang-ya hungti a kanatal malingatu tu cayay tu ku icelang, 7 a mihcaan hamin mataliyukay nu bayu a subal makayni piecaw, matalud matinenng mingayaw midebung mikuwan, nakamuan Sen-ya-ke natayza i Si-panga-ya musakamu tu nu kiwkay 7 a mihcaan, mapatay zikuz ya ukak tademen i Si-pang-ya. malakui' tu ku pinay a mihcaanz ikuz, u tadem niza nayay tu ku matinengay nu tademaw. katukuh 813 a mihcaan maazih tu nu malukay ku tadem zikuz, patizeng hantu nu tademaw tu cacay adidi'ay a kiwkay, pangangan hantu ku itiniay tu "Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la", zumaTe-kung-pow-s-te-la nu La-tin a kamu "Campus Stellae" "bunac a ulaulangan" anucaay "Compositum" "tadem" a nisasuma. "Campus Stellae" śąĖŤÄÖ"Compositum" śľĒŚĆĖšĺÜÁöĄ. nikuz, Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la mala nu Si-pan-ya mahiza u ciwlu, si-yen 10 se-citu sazikuzay a mihcaan, uyni a niyazu' namapeleng nu A-al-man mikeliday tu Mu-s-lin a hitay, nika kilul i 11 se-ci mahamin tu muliyaw mapatizeng, 12 se-ci tu sang-pan-ye, u balucu' patabaki tu icelang nu Ka-s-ti-li-ya hungti a kanatal atu Low-ma cyaw-tin a malecad ku balucu'. malingatu palahad tu pibaungan itini micunus tu sakay Si-pan g-ya tu kalilid nu kiwkay, sangaleb tulin tayni itini ku mibaungay, mahiza masa cacay u singanganay nu mibaungay a zazan nu Sen-ya-ke a zazan, a mililid ku Sen-ya-ke, Si-pang-ya i cung-se-ci a kitakitan u saicelangay, muliyaw malahad ku kesey, kahak atu nalimaan cacanan nu hekalay. nuayawan, labu nu tukay masinga' tu kunu makay cang-se-ci amalepun tu masanha' ku nipatizeng. . imahini, Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la a tinsikiw nu tukay a singanganay a panutekan, Sen-ti-yake-Te-kung-pow-s-te-la a talakaway a cacudadan patizen g i 16 se-ci, saayaway angangan pasubana' tu sesiw, imahini 4 a emang ku mkicudaday pulung nu talakaway a cacudadan. 2013 a mihcaan 7 a bulad, tiniay nasikawaw pihacengay ku silamalay a satebuc. Ś¶āšĽä, . malalitin tui hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

kamu a ŇčaŇčan", ujni a kitizaan i kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i ajaw nanu r~…ĺow-mw a tad…ôm, * s…ô- ¶i tu saajawaj a mińß ¶a ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu su-wi-b…ô a tad…ômaw, *** a nińß ¶aan atu su-wi-b…ô ńßunŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ u r~…ĺiwanzuma mapur~…ĺuŇč ma…ônu ¶ nu r~…ĺi-aw-wi- ¶i-ar~…ĺ-t…ô "r~…ĺiu*igir~…ĺd", mar~…ĺa nu si-k…ô-t…ô-ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ nu saka…ôn…ôm a sakuwan. kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan, makajzaaj ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, * a mińß ¶aan ńßamin matar~…ĺijukaj nu baju a subar~…ĺ makajni pi…ô ¶aw, matar~…ĺud matin…ônŇč miŇčajaw mid…ôbuŇč mikuwan, nakamuan s…ôn-ja-k…ô natajza i si-paŇča-ja musakamu tu nu kiwkaj * a mińß ¶aan, mapataj zikuz ja ukak tad…ôm…ôn i si-paŇč-ja. mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu ku pinaj a mińß ¶aanz ikuz, u tad…ôm niza najaj tu ku matin…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw. katukuńß *** a mińß ¶aan maazińß tu nu mar~…ĺukaj ku tad…ôm zikuz, patiz…ôŇč ńßantu nu tad…ômaw tu ¶a ¶aj adidi Ē~ °aj a kiwkaj, paŇčaŇčan ńßantu ku itiniaj tu "s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa", zumat…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa nu r~…ĺa-tin a kamu " ¶ampus st…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa…ô" "buna ¶ a ur~…ĺaur~…ĺaŇčan" anu ¶aaj " ¶ompositum" "tad…ôm" a nisasuma. " ¶ampus st…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa…ô" **" ¶ompositum" ****. nikuz, s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa mar~…ĺa nu si-pan-ja mańßiza u ¶iwr~…ĺu, si-j…ôn ** s…ô- ¶itu sazikuzaj a mińß ¶aan, ujni a nijazu Ē~ ° namap…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč nu a-ar~…ĺ-man mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu mu-s-r~…ĺin a ńßitaj, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ i ** s…ô- ¶i mańßamin tu mur~…ĺijaw mapatiz…ôŇč, ** s…ô- ¶i tu saŇč-pan-j…ô, u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° patabaki tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu ka-s-ti-r~…ĺi-ja ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ atu r~…ĺow-ma ¶jaw-tin a mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺańßad tu pibauŇčan itini mi ¶unus tu sakaj si-pan g-ja tu kar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu kiwkaj, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb tur~…ĺin tajni itini ku mibauŇčaj, mańßiza masa ¶a ¶aj u siŇčaŇčanaj nu mibauŇčaj a zazan nu s…ôn-ja-k…ô a zazan, a mir~…ĺir~…ĺid ku s…ôn-ja-k…ô, si-paŇč-ja i ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i a kitakitan u sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, mur~…ĺijaw mar~…ĺańßad ku k…ôs…ô, kańßak atu nar~…ĺimaan ¶a ¶anan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj. nuajawan, r~…ĺabu nu tukaj masiŇča Ē~ ° tu kunu makaj ¶aŇč-s…ô- ¶i amar~…ĺ…ôpun tu masanńßa Ē~ ° ku nipatiz…ôŇč. . imańßini, s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa a tinsikiw nu tukaj a siŇčaŇčanaj a panut…ôkan, s…ôn-ti-jak…ô-t…ô-kuŇč-pow-s-t…ô-r~…ĺa a tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan patiz…ôn g i ** s…ô- ¶i, saajawaj aŇčaŇčan pasubana Ē~ ° tu s…ôsiw, imańßini * a …ômaŇč ku mki ¶udadaj pur~…ĺuŇč nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad, tiniaj nasikawaw pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj ku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a sat…ôbu ¶. **, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tui ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
